jobs.name: Reddit Scraper
jobs.description: Fetches posts and comments from configured subreddits, extracts ticker mentions

params.label: Request Delay
params.description: Minimum delay between Reddit API requests

jobs.name: Ticker Reprocess
jobs.description: Re-extract tickers from all posts and comments (one-time cleanup)

jobs.name: NER + Ticker Extraction
jobs.description: Continuous queue-driven extraction of named entities (spaCy) and ticker mentions (regex) from posts and comments. Enqueues relevance scoring for all extracted entities. Polls every 10s when queue is empty.

jobs.name: Relevance Scoring
jobs.description: Drains the relevance_queue and scores (source, entity) pairs with the cross-encoder. Run after NER extraction or ticker extraction to process newly enqueued pairs.

jobs.name: Relevance Backfill
jobs.description: Finds all unscored (source, entity) pairs from ticker_mentions and named_entities and enqueues them into the relevance_queue. Run this then relevance_scoring to backfill scores.

jobs.name: Backfetch
jobs.description: Paginated historical post collection with progress tracking. Auto-selects subreddits needing backfill when none specified.

params.label: Subreddits
params.description: Comma or space separated list. Leave empty to auto-select subs needing backfill (not done, <900 posts).

params.label: Request Delay
params.description: Minimum delay between Reddit API requests

jobs.name: Fundamentals Fetcher
jobs.description: Pulls yfinance fundamental data for all tickers mentioned in the last 7 days, sorted by mention count. Runs at 90% yfinance rate limit.

params.label: Request Delay
params.description: Delay between yfinance API calls (default ~2s = 90% of rate limit)

jobs.name: Portfolio Snapshotter
jobs.description: Takes periodic snapshots of portfolio and strategy performance for equity curve tracking.

jobs.name: Bot Runner
jobs.description: Hourly evaluation of all active trading bots against the ticker universe. Discovers bots from bots/ directory, builds data points, and executes trades.

jobs.name: Price Archiver
jobs.description: Archives hourly OHLCV price data from yfinance for recently-mentioned tickers. Builds the price_history table used by backtesting.
